name: Longjian Road&Bridge Co.,Ltd
summary: Longjian Road&Bridge Co.,Ltd engages in the construction of roads and bridges in China and internationally. It is also involved in road, bridge, municipal, tunnel, and metro engineering; the operation of e-commerce platform for green and organic food; resources business; and investment and trading, as well as the provision of engineering design and financial services. The company was formerly known as Beiman Special Steel Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Longjian Road&Bridge Co.,Ltd in May 2002. Longjian Road&Bridge Co.,Ltd was founded in 1953 and is based in Harbin, China.
